task: Create a deeply researched MNIST improvement plan and output a valid plan JSON artifact.
scope: Survey current mnist pipeline/eval, inspect recent benchmark practices, and define a sequence of candidate improvement tasks with objective gates.

rubric: Research depth and source grounding are sufficient.
Task ordering is coherent and additive.
Each task has truthful verification criteria.

must_not_do: Prometheus must not write state/current/draft.md directly — delegate Atlas to produce the draft.
Do not run /init-deep, skill(init-deep), or create AGENTS.md files.
Do not pass fictional load_skills names; use only installed OMO skills or [].
Do not invent benchmark claims without traceable context.
Do not emit freeform output as final deliverable; output must be valid JSON plan.
Do not edit files outside state/ (executors) or .omo/plans/ (planner).

context.note: Prometheus writes the execution plan here (what to research).
Current project conventions and baseline context.
Deterministic evaluation path and baseline checks.
Executor deliverable: researched content before JSON structuring.
Final structured deliverable after structure phase.
